findings.title: Embedded Database Credentials in Code
findings.description: The Python script contains hardcoded database credentials within the `DATABASE_URL` environment variable. This exposes sensitive information and could lead to unauthorized access if the code is shared or deployed in an insecure environment.
findings.remediation: Remove hardcoded credentials from the code. Use environment variables or a secure vault to manage sensitive information.

findings.title: Skill does not specify a license
findings.description: Skill manifest does not include a 'license' field. Specifying a license helps users understand usage terms.
findings.remediation: Add 'license' field to SKILL.md frontmatter (e.g., MIT, Apache-2.0)

findings.title: Database connection string with embedded credentials
Database connection string with embedded credentials

scan_metadata.llm_overall_assessment: The skill package contains a significant security issue due to hardcoded database credentials in the Python script. This poses a risk of unauthorized data access if the code is exposed. No other critical security threats were identified in the provided components.
